fortress_at_target.warning: EOD TRAILING: Use recommended amount only. Run again before each payout.

pros: No consistency rule — win big on Tuesdays
cons: EOD trailing DD (floor rises with profits)
Manual copier execution adds ~1 tick slippage vs algo
firm_notes.noble_strategy: MANUAL EXECUTION MODE (automation banned). Keep live_firm.py running for signals. When signal fires, immediately open Tradovate UI via Uh-Oh button and manually enter. PHASE 1 (Day 1-3): 50% size. SESSION GOVERNOR only. Let trailing floor settle. Target $150/day. PHASE 2 (Day 4-7): 75% size. Prime sessions only (Tue + Golden Hour). PHASE 3 (Day 8+): Full size on prime sessions. STOP at $300 daily target HIT. Never chase. EOD ALARM at 3:54pm — FLATTEN EVERYTHING. Expected pass time: 8-12 trading days.

fortress_at_target.warning: EOD TRAILING: Use recommended amount only. Run again before each payout.

pros: FULL automation allowed (bots, EAs, all platforms)
NFA regulated — most trustworthy payout in industry
No EOD flat — overnight holds allowed
cons: EOD trailing MLL (floor rises with EOD balance — common misconception it is static)
firm_notes.noble_strategy: WINNING DAY RULE: Need 5 days each with $150+ net profit. Strategy: 5 winning days × $300+ = $1,500+ → but that is less than $3K target. Need to also HIT the profit target. Run 6-8 trading days. AUTOMATION: Full — run live_firm.py --prop TOPSTEP directly. No EOD flat = TURTLE can hold overnight trend positions (unique advantage). Spread gains across days. No need to avoid big days — just need 5 positive days. PAIRS gives daily $200-400 wins = natural fit for winning day requirement. Expected pass time: 6-9 trading days.

cons: EOD trailing DD (floor rises with profits)

firm_notes.noble_strategy: AUTOMATION: Full — run live_firm.py --prop LUCID directly. CONSISTENCY WATCH: Any day > 50% of running total triggers a caution. Example: If eval profit = $800 after day 3, next day limit = $400. Phase 1 (Day 1-2): 50% size, let consistency baseline establish. Phase 2 (Day 3-5): Full size on Tuesday + Golden Hour only. Best firm for pure automation run once funded (zero restrictions). Expected pass time: 5-8 trading days.

If running at $1,000 total eval profit, limit next day to $500. Target $300-400/day on prime sessions, pass in ~8-10 days. Phase 1 (Day 1-2): 50% size, learn the account. Day 3-8: Full prime session size with consistency governor. Expected pass: 8-12 days.

pros: NO payout ceiling — extract unlimited per cycle
cons: Floor moves with unrealized P&L peaks
firm_notes.noble_strategy: INTRADAY TRAILING = IntradayGuardian REQUIRED. PAIRS HEDGE ADVANTAGE: stat-arb uses 45% buffer of directional. $2,500 DD effectively = $5,555 for PAIRS strategy. Protocol: prime session only, bank $375 daily target then STOP. Never let a winner give back >30% of daily high. Guardian enforces size cascade if buffer compresses. Expected pass: 8-12 days (more conservative than EOD firms). UPSIDE: no payout cap — extract full profits each cycle.

cons: INTRADAY TRAILING DD — hardest structure (unrealized P&L moves floor)
Higher profit targets vs daily loss (3:1 ratio)
Longer time to pass due to higher targets
firm_notes.noble_strategy: MANUAL EXECUTION + INTRADAY TRAILING = double difficulty. Use live_firm.py signals → manually copy to Tradovate UI (Uh-Oh button). INTRADAY TRAILING: Never let a position go up $500 then give it back. Floor rises with unrealized gains. Exit winners quickly (no trailing). Do NOT try to pass in one big day. Spread across 10-15 days. Use the free reset: if first 3 days go wrong, reset immediately. Strategy: $200/day × 6 days = $1,200 (less than target). Need Tuesday golden-hour push. Expected pass time: 12-18 trading days.

Trailing stops at initial balance (protection below, not above)
cons: INTRADAY TRAILING including unrealized P&L (same as TPT/MFFU_RAPID)
Special eval consistency rule (3 best days check)
firm_notes.noble_strategy: AUTOMATION: Full — run live_firm.py directly. INTRADAY TRAILING: IntradayGuardian recommended (same as MFFU_RAPID). No EOD flat = TURTLE can hold overnight trend positions. EVAL CONSISTENCY: 3 best days must collectively account for ≥80% of best day. This is unusual — it means spread required across multiple positive days. Strategy: $200-300/day × 10 days. No EOD flat = unique TURTLE overnight carry advantage here. Expected pass time: 10-15 trading days.

fortress_at_target.warning: EOD TRAILING: Use recommended amount only. Run again before each payout.

pros: Longer runway (15 min days) — harder to blow up on one bad day
Good for beginners — more time to find rhythm
Gauntlet Mini is well-designed eval structure
cons: High profit targets relative to daily limit
Funded accounts switch to INTRADAY trailing (harder)
firm_notes.noble_strategy: LONG GAME strategy. 15 days minimum = no rushing. CONSISTENCY: Keep any single day under 30% of running eval profit. Example: running $1,500 eval profit → next day max = $450. $200/day average × 15 days = $3,000. Steady wins. Perfect for PAIRS agent (73% WR = consistent daily gains). Use bad weather days (when NQ quiet) to sit out. Expected pass time: 15-20 trading days.

fortress_at_target.warning: STATIC DD: Very safe to withdraw. Floor is fixed.

pros: STATIC DD — safest structure (floor never moves up)
NO daily loss limit — can take larger intraday swings
cons: SEMI automation only (custom-built; no commercial bots)
firm_notes.noble_strategy: BEST DD STRUCTURE FOR HIGH-CONVICTION DAYS: Static floor + no DLL. Can take bigger swings without risking daily bust. AUTOMATION: Our custom live_firm.py code qualifies as custom-built (not commercial). CONSISTENCY: 30% eval rule — keep any day under 30% of running eval profit. $300/day × 10 days = $3,000 (under the 30% cap per day). Standard 50%→75%→100% size ramp over 5-7 days. Expected pass time: 8-12 trading days.

pros: FULL automation — best in class (EAs, bots, Pine, APIs)
cons: 40% consistency rule applies BOTH eval and funded (tightest in industry)
10 active trading days min before payout (longer than listed)

firm_notes.noble_strategy: FULL AUTOMATION — run live_firm.py directly. CONSISTENCY RULE (40% eval AND funded): No single day > 40% of total. Example: $1,000 total profit at payout → max any one day = $400. LOW TARGETS: $300/day on 50K is achievable. 10 ACTIVE DAYS: Must trade 10 actual days (not just calendar). Strategy: $150-200/day × 10 days = $1,500-2,000. Tuesday golden hour counts as 1 active day. Keep days balanced — do not let Tuesday swamp the 40% rule. Expected pass time: 10-14 trading days.

pros: Personal scripts and custom automation allowed
cons: Floor moves with every new intraday high
Open position P&L affects trailing floor in real time

firm_notes.noble_strategy: CUSTOM AUTOMATION: Our live_firm.py counts as proprietary (not commercial). INTRADAY TRAILING = IntradayGuardian REQUIRED from day 1 of PRO phase. Open P&L counts toward trailing floor in real time. Strategy: 1-2 MNQ ONLY. Take profit immediately. Never let a winner give back more than 30%. Session Governor is MORE critical here — only trade HIGH ATR + Tuesday. NEVER hold through macro events (open P&L spike → lower floor). Expected pass time: 10-15 trading days. HONEST NOTE: Consider MFFU_RAPID (same structure, better terms).
